summaries.title: Dashboard feature flowcharts tab
summaries.summary: Added a static React/Tailwind Flowcharts tab to the SuperRoo dashboard, avoiding Mermaid/runtime dependencies. Register new pages by adding a view import, PAGES entry, pageLabel, and Sidebar NAV item. Validate UI changes with lint and build commands, ensuring lucide icon names match the installed lucide-react version to prevent Next type-checking failures.
